calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2016 Set For Trial On Aug-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Andrew S. Cho of The Oxbridge Law Group PC (916.929.1481) appears telephonically for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Gregory R. Shaughnessy, Esq. (415.435.2409.) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

PLAINTIFF JANGHO CURTAIN WALL AMERICAS CO. LTD'S Motion To Compel judicial reference is DENIED. The court exercises its discretion to deny reference in the interests of judicial economy. (Tarrant Bell Property, LLC v. Sup. Crt. (2011) 51 Cal.4th 538, 542.) There are already multiple actions regarding this project and the alleged lack of payment and other actions may be filed. Reference will lead to duplicative discovery and motion practice. Plaintiff's concerns regarding protracted litigation and delay are less persuasive because plaintiff filed this action in December of 2015 and is only now seeking reference and those concerns do not outweigh the judicial economy issues. If within 90 days The Build Group does not have a lawsuit against the owner, plaintiff may renew this motion. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Set For Case Management Conference On Aug-31-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Continued To Nov-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-26-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-25-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BUILD GROUP INC.'S DEMURRER to both causes of action alleged in the complaint is overruled. The court cannot determine as a matter of law based on the face of the complaint or matters which may be judicially noticed that a contractor's license is required for the installation of a curtain wall system. That issue will require further factual development and thus plaintiff's implicit allegation that no such license is required is sufficient to overcome the demurrer. Plaintiff has adequately alleged claims for breach of a written contracts and accounting. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
